body:
Fixes #232.

## Summary
- Treat direct, context-free Wikipedia summaries marked as `type: "disambiguation"` as usable when their entries are definition-style matches for the requested term.
- Parse Russian Wikipedia disambiguation page entries through the MediaWiki action API and render them as a sourced Wikipedia lookup before Wikidata fallback runs.
- Preserve the existing generic disambiguation behavior, including the Issue #70 `what is tesla` search fallback.
- Add the Issue #232 case study with raw GitHub/API data, online research notes, timeline, root cause, solution options, and verification logs.

## Reproduction
Before the fix, the browser worker skipped the exact Russian Wikipedia page `Существо` because the summary response was a disambiguation page, then accepted Wikidata `Q729` (`Animalia`) because `существо` is an alias. The new Playwright regression reproduces that path with mocked Wikipedia and Wikidata responses and fails on the old behavior.

## Tests
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `cargo test --verbose`
- `cargo test --doc --verbose`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:i18n`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:language-parity`
- `npm run --prefix tests/e2e check:intent-coverage`
- `npx playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.js multilingual.spec.js --grep "Issue #232"`
- `npx playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.js multilingual.spec.js --grep "what is tesla|Issue #232"`
- `npx playwright test --config=playwright.local.config.js multilingual.spec.js`
- `rust-script scripts/check-changelog-fragment.rs`
- `rust-script scripts/check-version-modification.rs`

Case study: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/blob/issue-232-b9341e555308/docs/case-studies/issue-232/README.md

- Updated [formal_ai_worker.js](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779478517743/src/web/formal_ai_worker.js:5601) to accept exact definition-style Wikipedia disambiguation pages like `Существо` and render their listed meanings before Wikidata fallback.
- Added a Playwright regression in [multilingual.spec.js](/tmp/gh-issue-solver-1779478517743/tests/e2e/tests/multilingual.spec.js:1098) proving `Animalia/Q729` no longer wins.
